basic_details.job_title: Assam APSC JE Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 53 Junior Engineer Posts
basic_details.short_information: Assam APSC Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 53 vacancies across Assam. Candidates with Diploma Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 11-05-2026, and closes on 10-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through APSC website, apsc.nic.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Public Works (Building & National Highways) Department, Government of Assam
basic_details.application_mode: Online only through APSC recruitment portal

qualification.education_qualification: 3-year Diploma in Electrical Engineering (Regular) from an AICTE-recognised institute

how_to_apply: Applicants must apply online only through the APSC recruitment website: https://apscrecruitment.in; no other mode of application will be accepted.
New users must first complete One Time Registration (OTR) by clicking on “Register Here” and providing basic details; use a valid and active email ID and mobile number.
After creating an account, log in with credentials and fill in all required registration and application details carefully; mandatory fields are marked with an asterisk (*).

Upload necessary documents: proof of Date of Birth, educational qualification mark sheets and certificates, caste/category/BPL/PwBD certificates, domicile proof (PRC/Employment Exchange), Small Family Norms declaration, etc. in PDF format (max 4 MB, 200 dpi, legible).
Upload recent passport-size Photograph and Signature in JPG/JPEG format (Photo: 50–200 KB, not older than 3 months; Signature: 50–200 KB).
Verify all details and documents using the ‘Preview’ option and tick the declaration checkbox to enable final submission.
Proceed to pay the applicable application fee/processing charges online; in case of payment failure or pending status, use the “Check Status” option to verify with bank/GRAS.
After successful submission and payment, an auto-generated confirmation email/SMS will be sent to the registered email ID/mobile number.
Take a print-out of the submitted online application form and keep it safely for future reference and interview/document verification.
Candidates may also use Common Service Centres (CSCs) for filling and submitting the form if they do not have debit card/internet banking facilities.
seo_tags: Assam Public Service Commission Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026

basic_details.job_title: Assam APSC Home Guards Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 22 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Assam Public Service Commission (APSC) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 22 Home Guards. Candidates with Any Graduate Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 08-05-2026, and closes on 07-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through APSC website, apsc.nic.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Assam Home Guards Services under Home and Political Department
basic_details.application_mode: Online only at APSC Recruitment portal

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in any discipline from a Government-recognised University

how_to_apply: Applicants must apply online only through the APSC recruitment website: https://apscrecruitment.in.
New users have to complete One Time Registration (OTR) first by clicking on “Register Here” and providing basic details.
Use a valid and active email ID and mobile number for registration and future communication.
Log in with registered email/mobile number and password, then fill in all mandatory details in the online application form.

Upload required documents: proof of Date of Birth, educational qualification certificates and mark sheets, caste/category certificates, BPL/PwBD certificates (if applicable) in PDF format (max 4 MB, scanned at 200 dpi, legible).
Upload recent passport-size Photograph and Signature (50 KB–200 KB each, photo not older than 3 months).
Carefully review all details and documents using the Preview option and tick the declaration checkbox before final submission.
Pay the applicable application fee and processing charges online; applications without successful fee payment will be treated as incomplete.
In case of payment failure or pending status, use “Check Status” to verify with bank/GRAS; double debit, if any, will be auto-refunded by the bank within 5–7 working days.
After final submission, take a printout of the submitted Online Application Form and retain it for future reference.
Candidates can also submit applications through Common Service Centres (CSCs) if they do not have their own online payment facility.
Class-I Home Guards Application Form
